title: doratoxylon stipulatum
intro: Doratoxylon stipulatum, also known as the Filipino ironwood, is a plant species native to the Philippines, characterized by its unique, iron-hard wood. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Doratoxylon stipulatum include its ability to reduce pain, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's wood is often used to make extracts, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
